value.text: I want to book an appointment

parameters.query: SELECT enable_bookings FROM bot_config WHERE tenant_id = {{$node['trigger'].json.tenantId}}
SELECT id, name FROM staff WHERE tenant_id = {{$node['trigger'].json.tenantId}} AND (availability_json IS NOT NULL OR availability_json != '')

SELECT DISTINCT DATE(date) as available_date FROM appointments WHERE staff_id = {{$node['trigger'].json.selected_staff_id}} AND DATE(date) >= CURDATE() AND DATE(date) <= DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 14 DAY) AND status NOT IN ('cancelled', 'no-show') LIMIT 14

INSERT INTO appointments (tenant_id, customer_id, phone, service, staff_id, date, time_start, duration_minutes, status, created_at) VALUES ({{$node['trigger'].json.tenantId}}, 0, '{{$node['trigger'].json.phone}}', 'General Consultation', {{$node['trigger'].json.selected_staff_id}}, '{{$node['trigger'].json.selected_date}}', '{{$node['trigger'].json.selected_time}}', 60, 'pending', NOW())

INSERT INTO conversations (tenant_id, phone, direction, content, source, created_at) VALUES ({{$node['trigger'].json.tenantId}}, '{{$node['trigger'].json.phone}}', 'outbound', 'Your appointment has been confirmed!', 'booking', NOW())
